title: Tf2Craft
description: The mod adds items and chips from Team Fortress 2.
body:
Experience the excitement of the game Team Fortress 2 within the blocky world of Minecraft with this thrilling mod. Now, you can enjoy all the elements of this renowned shooter game right in your favorite Minecraft realm! **and install GeckoLib**

Скоро будет [Русский язык](https://ru.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D0%A0%D1%83%D1%81%D1%81%D0%BA%D0%B8%D0%B9_%D1%8F%D0%B7%D1%8B%D0%BA)

Жақында [Қазақ тілі](https://kk.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D2%9A%D0%B0%D0%B7%D0%B0%D2%9B_%D1%82%D1%96%D0%BB%D1%96)
